sources.title: Frequently asked questions on virtual currency transactions
sources.summary: IRS treats convertible virtual currency as property (Notice 2014-21); disposals are taxable; gain/loss on Form 8949 and Schedule D.

sources.title: Instructions for Form 8949 (2025)
sources.summary: Reporting of capital asset dispositions including digital assets.

sources.title: 1040 (2025) Instructions — digital asset question
sources.summary: Filers must answer the digital-asset question whether or not a 1099-DA was received.

sources.title: Final regulations and related IRS guidance for reporting by brokers on sales and exchanges of digital assets
sources.summary: Brokers report gross proceeds for transactions on/after Jan 1 2025; basis for certain covered transactions on/after Jan 1 2026.

sources.title: IRS provides additional transition relief for brokers required to file information returns and backup withhold on certain digital asset sales
sources.summary: Transition relief on backup withholding for digital-asset broker reporting.

sources.title: IRS extends digital asset broker relief through 2027 under Notice 2025-33
sources.summary: Notice 2025-33 delays backup-withholding obligations to Jan 1 2027.
sources.reliability_notes: Tier-2 firm explainer of an IRS notice; used as secondary context alongside the IRS primary.

sources.title: Notice 2020-2: Virtual Currency Reporting on the FBAR
sources.summary: A foreign account holding only virtual currency is not currently FBAR-reportable; FinCEN intends to propose an amendment to include virtual currency.
sources.reliability_notes: Status as of 2026 review: amendment not finalized. Re-verify each quarter.

sources.title: Foreign Cryptocurrency: U.S. FBAR and FATCA Reporting Requirements
sources.summary: Explains FBAR/FATCA treatment of foreign crypto accounts, including mixed accounts.

sources.title: FinCEN guidance on convertible virtual currencies (money transmission)
sources.summary: Distinguishes hosted from unhosted wallets; non-transmitting unhosted-wallet software providers are not MSBs.
sources.reliability_notes: URL is the FinCEN guidance hub; confirm exact 2019 CVC guidance document at next review.

sources.title: Analysis of self-custody policy and the withdrawn unhosted-wallet proposal
sources.summary: Secondary context on self-custody policy debate; the 2020 unhosted-wallet proposal was withdrawn in 2024.
sources.reliability_notes: Tier-3 advocacy source; used only as secondary context, not as the sole support for the legality claim.

sources.title: Travel Rule Crypto in the United States (FinCEN)
sources.summary: Summary of US travel-rule implementation and the $3,000 threshold.
sources.reliability_notes: Tier-3; confirm threshold against the FinCEN funds-transfer/travel rule primary at next review.

sources.title: Instructions for Form 8854 (2025) — Expatriation
sources.summary: Covered-expatriate tests and §877A deemed-sale mechanics; thresholds for the relevant year.

sources.title: Expatriation Tax
sources.summary: Citizenship-based taxation and the exit-tax framework.

sources.title: 2026 Estate and Gift Tax Update
sources.summary: 2026 federal lifetime exemption $15M per individual; annual gift exclusion $19,000.
sources.reliability_notes: Tier-2; confirm figures against the IRS annual inflation-adjustment revenue procedure at next review.

sources.title: IRS Announces Increased Gift and Estate Tax Exemption Amounts for 2026
